programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about "Other Sochi Games", "Pokeaphobia" and what it means to be a "Virgin Larper".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Hampton Yount joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to check out the danger of "Risky Bits", listen to some "Next Level Narrators" and learn what it means to get "Hamspired".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 825
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 727
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness WORLD WAR BEE, diagnose a medical condition known as BACKFLIP BLOCK, and avoid stray tires in THE WHEEL WORLD.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in "Trading Paint," play some "Next Level Games" and get into some road rage throwdowns in "Street Heat."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827
programme.desc: Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his "Crappy Birthday," people who are "Built Like 50," and others who, like 50, are real "Show Stealers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Tonight on an all new Ridiculousness, the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer/songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow "Aisle Trolls", be misunderstood while "Speaking Leonese"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, reality star Tami Roman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about her extreme case of RATNAPHOBIA, what it means to be STREET DUMB, and about living with BUTT REGRET.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the fierce LAWN WARRIORS, learn some wisdom in SPEAK YOUR MIND and witness some FURRY FURY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 723
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 423
programme.desc: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy host your favorite nature show; Untamed World. In this episode they go in search of the dying breed of the lummox. Deep in the wood they find a freckled red neck known as Booger Red.

programme.desc: As a hurricane approaches Lawndale, the town's residents spontaneously break into song, and Daria, Jane, Brittany, and Kevin are forced to brace the storm together.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When his favorite TV series ends with a dumb twist, Grimes has a complete mental breakdown.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy get jobs as fire dogs and save a cast full of characters during a 40-story building fire. After reading the story of the Littlest Giant'

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 17

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: When Quinn and the Fashion Club find themselves stranded after a botched bus ride, Jake and Daria take Trent's old car to get them.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When the roommates are forced to participate in a food challenge, relationships are tested.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Morgendorffers reluctantly attend a family wedding in which Daria and Quinn are bridesmaids, and Daria finds something in common with her Aunt Amy.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: After Lawndale High gets roped into a marketing scheme as a result of school budget cuts, Ms. Li gets in over her head, and Daria takes a stand.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy's rocket hurtles out of control and leaves them marooned on an eerie uncharted planet, where they attempt to find food and avoid the hideous Brainiac men.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy journey to the Blue-Cheese Mountains to become miners. After dealing with some savages, they finally reach the blessed mountains where they mine the cheese and dream of being rich.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After winning a contest for Gritty Kitty Litter.

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 31
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 32
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 33
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: A woman discovers that the floor of a department store, on which she bought a gold thimble, doesn't exist - and that her 'saleslady' is really a mannequin!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 35
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S1 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A playwright makes characters come to life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A pilot of a downed WW II bomber comes to in the African desert and desperately tries to find out what happened to the rest of his crew.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A luckless couple stumbles upon fortune when a genie materializes from a bottle in their antique shop. The genie grants them four wishes but warns them, prophetically, to be careful what you wish for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Small time criminal Jackie Rhoades must face both his past and his conscience while waiting for his next assignment.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While Dr. Sloan impatiently waits for Community General to reopen, Caitlin Sweeney resurfaces as a member of R.O.A.R. (Revolutionary Order for Armed Rebellion).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's day begins with a phone call from a kidnapper who happened to dial the wrong number - his! The kidnapper believes he's called the original victim and demands Dr. Sloan deliver money if he wants to see his son alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Jesse and Susan are on their way to Mount Carmel for a romantic getaway weekend but detour to a fishing town when their car breaks down. They grab a bite at the local diner when Susan sees a man she used to know.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Personal grievances get in the way of detective Harry Trumble's retirement party. Trumble never forgave Dr. Sloan for marrying his college sweetheart and dedicated his life to his work.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr. Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 20
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the season premiere, we meet 15 brand new designers on an airfield outside of NYC.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are surprised to see their models wearing millions of dollars of exquisite jewels.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are taken to Coney Island and split into teams for the Yoplait Challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Jesse Tyler Ferguson challenges the designers to create a garment that incorporates bowties.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers are divided into teams to make a 3-piece mini collection inspired by their Lexus Sedan.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers create performance wear that is also fashionable for her New Balance collection.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: At brunch, Tim explains that their challenge is to design a look for the Modern Southern woman.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: L’Oreal Paris gives designers the opportunity to make over “Superfans” of Project Runway.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the HP Challenge, the designers use inspirations they receive from Next Generation Innovators.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the L’Oreal Makeup Challenge, the designers create an avant-garde look inspired by butterflies.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Fashion Week is around the corner, and remaining designers return home to work on their collections.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the designers, the opportunity to show at New York Fashion Week has finally arrived.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: All of the designers reunite one last time to discuss their experiences on Project Runway together.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Arachnids and insects serve as inspiration for the designers to create an avant-garde look.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Signature cocktails at Jay Z’s legendary 40/40 Club stir up ideas for runway worthy cocktail dresses

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers create high impact fashion from materials found in an elementary classroom.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers pair up to create modern looks inspired by Lifetime’s 1930s mini-series Bonnie & Clyde.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Marge Simpson turns to the All Stars to design a date night dress for an evening out with Homer.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Remaining designers visit the headquarters of QVC where they are asked to design a red carpet dress.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers team up with influential fashion bloggers to identify a new trend for 2014.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars work with design house Milly to create ready-to-wear looks to be sold for charity.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Season finale. Designers present collections inspired by their own heritage at a VIP runway show.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Alyssa Milano reunites all 11 designers to rehash the season in this Reunion Special.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Tim Gunn introduces the eighteen new designers on the premiere of Project Runway Season 13.

programme.desc: The models pose with nature’s elements, and one participant’s competitiveness upsets two of her rivals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 57
programme.desc: In today's mammoth elimination challenge, the contestants discover not only will they be cooking a four-course meal for the MasterChef judges, but for some very special guests also.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 58
programme.desc: The contestants discover today's mystery box, covered in a Union Jack flag, has been set by guest chef Gordon Ramsay. Who's first into Grand Finale Week?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In tonight's elimination challenge contestants must choose to use either ingredients from an ordinary pantry or an extraordinary pantry. Which favourite contestant will go?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In today's Semi-Final challenge, our top three contestants compete for a place in the Grand Final. At the end of today's challenge, three become two.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 61
programme.desc: After a long culinary journey the two finalists are competing for a $250,000 cash prize and the title of MasterChef Australia 2020.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The MasterChef kitchen welcomes 12 emerging home cooks and 12 of MasterChef's most loved past contestants. Together they will share their love of food and compete to become Australia's next MasterChef.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a massive service challenge, it's Fans versus Favourites, course versus course in the ultimate three course battle, with the winning teams heading to tomorrow's immunity decider challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Split into four teams across four benches, 12 contestants discover they have 75 minutes on the clock to create a dish using the ingredients from a particular layer of the balanced diet food pyramid.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's this season's first immunity challenge! Choosing ingredients from mystery cloches, the contestant with the best dish wins immunity and will sit out Sunday's elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's the first elimination of the year! The makers of the best jaffle in round one will be safe, but the chef with the least satisfying dish that changed their life" in round two will go home."

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish using the same ingredients that were in the very first mystery box in MasterChef season one, The least impressive fare will send their chefs to a pressure test cook-off.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dessert king Adriano Zumbo returns to the MasterChef kitchen for a pressure test like no other. The contestant with the least impressive take on Zumbo's Polly Want A Waffle will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Four teams vie for a shot at immunity in the infamous team relay challenge. This time, teams won't even know the mystery ingredient until the clock starts ticking! Plus, the first Masterclass of 2022.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The winning team in yesterday's relay challenge join the top two mystery box winners for a chance at immunity as they try to Beat The Chef, who just happens to be MasterChef favourite Matt Stone.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Bonjour! Get ready for tonight's classic service challenge with guest chef Shannon Bennett. Each team must cook a French inspired entrÃ©e, main and dessert for 20 diners plus the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Guest chef Shannon Bennett returns with 10 of his favourite fridge and pantry items to create today's mystery box. The two least impressive cooks will face off in tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 12
programme.desc: MasterChef alumni and dessert King, Reynold Poernomo, returns to set tonight's pressure test dish: his new intricate signature dessert, noi. The chef who fails to cope with the dish will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone leads teams out to the MasterChef garden for a fast-food versus fancy food service. With 80 ravenous diners waiting, the winners will head to the next immunity challenge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an Immunity Challenge with a twist, there are three Immunity Idols up for grabs. Whoever scores one will see Tribal Council will swing in their favour...or will it?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The Immunity Challenge tests our hangry Castaways on spelling and balancing, with a challenge beast setting their eyes on the prize. Plus, At Tribal Council, a double agent is outed!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tensions within Brawn start a double blindside, but there's an importance in a blindside of picking the right target at the right time.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's Day 34 in the Australian Outback, and the feeling at camp is excitement for Brains, who now rule the camp.The biggest KEY to playing Survivor is to keep your closest allies safe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: George and Cara have stuck by each other through thick and thin, however, when the rest of the Tribe realise, will the King and Queen of Survivor's reign be over?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: George survives tribal by the skin of his teeth to regain the majority, but his ability to stay in the game lies in the hands of one person, Wai.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dani & Flick are on the bottom of the pack, but they are two strong physical & social threats who are here to fight. Will George's kingdom crumble under the persuasive powers of the remaining Brawn?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dani concedes that the only way to get ahead in this game is to exploit some cracks in the majority alliance, but that would mean trusting someone who has betrayed her in the past.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Day 44, The four former brains have formed an impenetrable alliance leaving Flick, the only remaining brawn on the outer. Little do they know she's getting ready to shake things up!

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 23
programme.desc: As we near the end of the competition, will the game's longest lasting power couple, finally have to turn on each other?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S6 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Who will outwit...outplay...and outlast the other to become the ultimate Sole Survivor in the final episode of Brains Vs. Brawn?

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 7

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 8

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 9

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A reality drama based on the gorgeous and glamorous characters that live it large in Essex. Tonight ….. Will Kirk go through with his tattoo? Will Mark turn up for Lauren’s birthday party?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The uber glam world of Essex will act as the backdrop to the series: nail bars, wine bars, spray tans, flash cars, big watches – these people live it large and just can’t get enough drama into their lives.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1005
programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1101
programme.desc: The Geordies are back and buzzin' as big boss Anna sends them off to Greece! Holly and Kyle kick off, while Gaz and Charlotte find themselves in a very awkward situation. (S11, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1102
programme.desc: Big boss Anna sends the guys to their new home in Crete. Chloe wants to know where she stands with Scott. Charlotte and Marnie have some explaining to do after their first night in Malia. (S11, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1103
programme.desc: Gaz's pulling competition causes a bust up for Aaron and Scott. Charlotte tells Holly some home truths about Kyle while the toga party sees Chloe and Scott get closer than ever. (S11, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104
programme.desc: Chloe causes carnage at the boat party while Kyle comes to a big decision over Holly. Marnie sees Kyle at the club and the simmering tensions boil over and it all kicks off. (S11, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1106
programme.desc: Kyle and Hollys' split continues to divide the boys and girls. Scott upsets Chloe, Holly confronts Kyle while Charlotte goes to extraordinary lengths in search of a kebab. (S11, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1107
programme.desc: Chloe's attempt to get Scott's attention goes badly while the Holly & Kyle situation comes to a head. The boys come to blows with huge consequences for Holly & Kyle. (S11, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1108
programme.desc: After his dramatic exit, the Geordies come to terms with life after Kyle. Chloe's plan to make Scott jealous backfires and Charlotte gives Holly some very tough love. (S11, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1109
programme.desc: Chloe confronts Scott and lets slip how she truly feels. Meanwhile, Marnie gets an unexpected call while Nathan has some big news for the family. (S11, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1110
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1201
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1202
programme.desc: Charlotte finally turns up with some bunnies and some bigger news for Gaz. Will Holly share her secret? Aaron and Scott's dates with Chantelle end badly as the lads and Chloe all kick off. (S12, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1203
programme.desc: Charlotte gets the girls to go hard on Gaz, Scott drops the girlfriend bomb on Chantelle and Holly has a big bust up with Charlotte when she sees her kissing Chloe. (S12, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1204
programme.desc: With Holly away, Chloe and Charlotte's friendship goes next level. Chantelle's plan to test Scott goes badly wrong and Chloe is quick to take advantage. (S12, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1205
programme.desc: Gaz and Charlotte spend the night together, Chloe finally comes clean to Chantelle over what she gave Scott and it all kicks off. Plus there's one huge shock when Marnie returns. (S12, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1206
programme.desc: Chloe is buzzin' when a new lad arrives. Marnie goes mental when a girl of Aaron's turns up and it kicks off again when the newbie drops Scott right in it with Chantelle.(S12, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1207
programme.desc: Marnie necks on with new lad Marty to teach Aaron a lesson. Charlotte's got Chloe's back when it all kicks off between the girls. Gary and Charlotte end up in bed causing ripples. (S12, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1208
programme.desc: It's the final episode. Gary returns and drops a bombshell. Marty suffers an embarrassing problem with Chloe. Holly needs to make an all important decision, and there's a shock exit! (S12, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1301
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! After jetting off to Magaluf, Marnie and Holly are having issues while Marty opens up to Chloe. Things are going well until Chloe gets jealous and it all kicks off. (S13, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1302
programme.desc: At a boat party in Ibiza, Aaron drops the G-bomb on Marnie, and single Gaz is back when he pulls Chantelle. But how will Holly react when she finds out? And Chloe's plans don't go smoothly. (S13, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1303
programme.desc: Big boss Anna is fuming when the squad finally return from Ibiza. Marnie's plan to get Aaron's attention backfires and the couple reach crisis point when Nathan gets involved. (S13, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1304
programme.desc: Chloe gets jealous of Holly and Marty and kicks off. Scott receives some big news and there's a shock arrival which has huge consequences for Gaz and Chantelle. (S13, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1305
programme.desc: It's seriously awks between Sophie, Gaz and Chantelle. Aaron finally returns but Marnie isn't happy. Chantelle and Marty clash over Chloe. Nathan takes getting mortal to the next level. (S13, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1306
programme.desc: It's the morning after Chantelle's departure... Sophie gets some big news from boss Anna, Aaron ends up in an ambulance and Chloe goes all out to get over Marty at the pool party. (S13, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Vinny weighs his options: Should he stay, or head home to Staten Island? Snooki fights with Jionni, and the roommates are back to their usual antics - partying and tanning to the extreme. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: The roommates struggle to adjust to life at the Shore without Vinny, while Mike confronts his own internal demons. But it's also Pauly's birthday and he gets the best present of his life! (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Mike returns only to find out that Danny has threatened to get new roommates! The girls hire strippers for Pauly and Mike's wild birthday party whilst the roomies go to kidnap Vinny. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Vinny returns and everyone celebrates. The Situation tries hard to be nice but ends up annoying the boys. Snooki struggles with an uncomfortable condition. (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: The Situation secretly gathers information to bring down one of his roommates - and for once it isn't Snooki. JWOWW freaks out when Roger disappears and doesn't return her calls. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: One of the roommates cause drama with the Snooki and Deena, while Jenni's skimpy outfit creates a problem for Roger. A crazy night at Karma nightclub ends in a fight. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: The cast tries to avoid a shark attack when they go fishing. Jenni confronts Pauly's stalker. Snooki sets her sights on Vinny when her boyfriend rejects her affections. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Mike decides he can wait no longer to reveal 'the truth' to Snooki's boyfriend. Pauly, Vinny, and Deena find it difficult to be the single roommates in the Shore House. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: A battle royale breaks out after Mike reveals to Jionni that he hooked up with Snooki. Some of the roommates go camping, while Vinny and Pauly pull the greatest prank in Shore history! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: As the roommates prepare to leave, Mike starts a rumour about Deena's sister. Pauly and Vinny prank the house, and the Storm of the Century hits the Shore. (S5, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: The drama continues when the Jersey Shore house mates get together to relive the highs and lows of the past summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Everyone returns to the shore for one last time. The Situation comes clean about his recovery and Snooki faces the challenge of being pregnant in a party house. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: There are some big changes in store for the loveable gang, but expect even more all-night partying, hot hook-ups and shocking tantrums than ever before. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Jenni plans a surprise birthday party for Roger that goes south, Deena auditions Danny to be a meatball and the roommates find themselves in the middle of a brawl at the club. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 610
programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 614
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
