programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S1 Ep. 1

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: We catch up with teenage mum Maria whose morbid obesity was threatening her life, Chris is back to see if heâ€™s put his penile pain behind him.

programme.desc: We revisit John who first came to the clinic with a severe case of anal abscesses. After 15 operations on his anus, we see him undergo his final operation and he's coming back to the clinic.

programme.desc: On tonight's show Dr Christian meets a girl with assymetric breasts and looks after a man whose penis has curved right around, while Dr Pixie takes on a shocking case of painful scalp pustules.

programme.desc: Patients returning to meet Dr Christian and Dr Dawn include a man who had a problem with swollen testicles and a woman with a cyst in a very embarrassing area.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The doctors are back on the Costa del Sol tonight, as they tackle more embarrassing beach body problems.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The doctors revisit some of their bravest patients from previous shows in order to check on their progress and provide further treatment where necessary.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tonight Dr Christian helps a man whose rare genetic condition has left him needing new ears. Dr Pixie's patient has a leaky back passage, the cause of which he can't get to the bottom of.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tonight on Embarrassing Bodies, Dr. Christian helps Adele, whose cosmetic surgery in Thailand left her with painful, patchy hair and issues from buttock implants.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dr Christian sees a nine year old with the worst case of verrucas that he has ever seen. Dr Pixie sees a mother whoâ€™s been left with problems with her bottom after giving birth to a large baby.

programme.desc: 1 in 10 men will have a problem with their pride and joy, but nearly 20% are too embarrassed to see their GP, so our doctors unveil their top tips for keeping your penis tip top.

programme.desc: Today the Embarrassing Bodies truck is in Nottingham where John, a young man who's had to put up with a painful and embarrassing problem with his bottom for years.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tonight, Dr Pixie sees a man who's had an itchy bottom for 20 years, while Dr Dawn's talking periods with three fearless girls who volunteer to measure their own menstrual flow.

programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The night of October 16, 1998, will long be remembered as one of the worst nights of flooding in Texas history.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 104
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 47
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 79
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 41
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 69
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 53
programme.desc: A report on the September 3, 2006 disappearance of Nina Reiser, a Russian doctor who had married Hans Reiser, an American computer whiz. Their marriage began to fall apart and Nina began an affair with Sean Sturgeon, Hans' best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 57
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A report on the cold cases of two young women, both new to the areas where they lived, who were both raped and murdered.

programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In July 2008, Michael Roseboro called 911 to report that he had just found the body of his wife, Jan, at the bottom of their pool. An autopsy revealed that she had been strangled, beaten and then drowned: her death was ruled a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It was February 2002 when Cynthia Sommer, her husband, Marine Sgt. Todd Sommer, and their four children were coming home from a family weekend at an amusement park.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 60

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 37
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 21

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 2358

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 1

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is on Rose Island to investigate their haunted lighthouse. This island housed cholera victims exiled from Newport, and many of the sick never returned to the mainland.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS gets intothe Christmas spirit at New Hampshire's Christmas Farm Inn.

programme.desc: The TAPS team travels south to Ybor City, Florida to the historic Cuban Club.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hampton Falls, New Hampshire to investigate the Governors Mansion, a property Steve has investigated before with a local team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to King George, Virginia to become the first paranormal team to investigate Belle Grove Plantation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Worcester, Massachusetts to investigate the Higgins Armory, the only armory in the western hemisphere devoted to arms and armor.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Sylvan Beach, New York where the new owner of a historic amusement park finds himself in the middle of a mystery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On this episode on Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to South Dakota for the first time to investigate the Alex Johnson Hotel, a place filled with history.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS and 2 special guests investigate the Brunswick Old City Hall where an officer was shot and killedin the 1890's. Will TAPS discover that he's still on duty?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to the historic St. Charles, Missouri to investigateMain Street's hauntings.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lucas, Ohio for two cases. The first stop, to look into phenomena connected to a gruesome event, The Ceely Rose Murders.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S11 Ep. 2
programme.desc: An armory that's been standing for over 100 years harbors a ghostly mystery. Recent female leadership is coinciding with increased paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Chicago Illinois to investigate a Chicago landmark for nearly a century, the Congress Theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: TAPS heads to Quincy, Massachusetts to investigate the unexplainable paranormal events that are haunting a 716 foot long ship.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.desc: Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.desc: Jimmy comes up with a snack that is even tastier than everyone's favorite. Miss Fowl swallows a seed from Jimmy's DNA-accelerated spinach plant turning her into a 50-foot plant creature.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: SwaySway likes his bap so much he wishes there were more of him in 'Buhdouble Trouble', and in 'Unlucky Duckies', SwaySway discovers a loaf of Pot of Gold Bread and gets cursed by a surly Loafrechaun.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Amity Park is in the midst of a drought, and Mayor Vlad, eager to score points, releases Vortex, the weather ghost, to make it rain.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On a field trip everyone notices Tucker bears a striking resemblance to an egyptian pharaoh and after he looks in a ghostly mirror, his minion, Hotep Ra, comes to life.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Craig meets his long-lost brother, Ronnie Slithers, who uses devious methods to try and turn the dudes against one another.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Boredom causes Jimmy to create an overly energetic robot for a little brother. After bringing Thomas Edison to the present, history rewrites itself by vanquishing all electrical machinery.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Helga has been secretly building a shrine in her closet to Arnold. She has been collecting his combs, old school photos, used band-aids and chewing gum, but only one thing will make the shrine complete: Arnold's hat.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When it looks like Otto will make the cover of Gnarly Surf Magazine, Reggie is angry because the photographer doesn't think girls can surf.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts!/Timmy makes magic "You Doo" dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Full Moon/Ms. Pataki, Student-Teacher: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it''s a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. The gang all worry that Arnold will snitch.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: TV's Adam West, star of the superhero series "Catman," never had a real childhood. Timmy wishes that Adam could become a kid again. / Timmy wishes Cosmo and Wanda were Tootie's birthday fairies for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Lame Ducks/Perfect Nightmare: Dad organizes a neighborhood watch program to catch a neighborhood thief. Timmy wishes he had the perfect family in order to win a contest. Everyone goes crazy trying to be perfect.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 65
programme.desc: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. / When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Girly Squirrely/Birthday Battle: Transmorphers Versus Unicorns: Chloe joins the Squirrely Scouts and saves the troop by helping them get their first merit badge. Timmy and Chloe find out they have the same birthday and compete for the best party.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Norb awakes to find he suffers from the offensive condition of Stinky Toe. Dag embarks on a perilous mission to discover the cure.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dag discovers annoying your brother isn't much fun when Norb 'bops him into last week' and Dag is forced to retrace his errant steps over and over again with painful results.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dag and Norb are driven to the height of annoyance when a needy tree lizard, Bing, attaches himself to them and won't leave.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Certifiable Super Sitter: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Norb befriends Stump (an actual tree stump). Despite Dag's jealousy Norb realizes he has not lost a brother, but gained a friend.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The Big Scoop/Harold's Kitty: Arnold and Helga are editors of competing school newspapers. Harold softens when he finds a lost cat and then refuses to give it up to its rightful owner. Arnold eventually persuades Harold to give up the kitty.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Dad changes Timmy’s room into a surveillance center to prove that his kindly neighbor, Dinkleberg, is truly evil. Being the best neighbor ever, Dinkleberg pretends to be evil just to make Dad feel better.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Animal Crockers/One Flu Over the Crocker’s Nest: Chloe wishes that an animal that looks like Mr. Crocker would no longer be endangered. Timmy, Chloe and the fairies go inside Mr. Crocker to destroy the magical Fairy Flu germs Cosmo sneezed on him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Ransom/Ms. Perfect: When Timberly's doll is kidnapped, Gerald and Arnold track it down. A new classmate is tormented by Helga and the other girls but is eventually accepted.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Helga drops her journal full of love poems about Arnold into a pile of books./ Arnold's class goes on a field trip to the aquarium where Arnold waits to see Lockjaw.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's "Bring Your Kid to Work Day," and Dad takes Timmy to his office. When Timmy accidentally eats Poof (who is hiding as a marshmallow in Timmy's cereal) Timmy becomes magically talented at soccer.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cheese and Crockers/Land Before Timmy: Timmy wishes up a machine that allows him to merge with other items to become half-Timmy/half-whatever. Timmy’s tired of technology taking over and ruining his life so he wishes for a simpler world.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Dimmsdale Tales: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 77
programme.desc: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Otto, Sam And Twister agree to sneak out for Mischief Night.The kids think nothing of accidentally destroying Violet's garden until Merv explains that they've ruined her chances of taking first prize.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.desc: Casa Paradiso/Gerald''s Tonsils: Grandpa becomes tired of dealing with the boarding house and decides to sell./Gerald has his tonsils removed before a big concert and must come to grips with the fact that his voice has changed.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Otto and Reggie's fierce battle to prove who is the best snowboarder goes too far. Otto breaks his leg but still tries to play hockey.

programme.desc: The forest is invaded by the beavers' enemies, lumberjacks. These guys just don't cut down trees, they sing, as well!

programme.desc: When Otto's snowboard gets mangled before a competition, smooth-talking, two-faced Snomart rep Dick Shackley offers Ottos a corporate sponsorship.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 48

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 13

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ocean Shores is overrun with shoobies'

programme.desc: Timmy borrows Mark Chang’s Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie’s costume party. Unfortunately, he knows nothing about Yugopotamian technology and soon the device is causing Timmy to turn into all sorts of crazy creatures.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Helga's Boyfriend/Crush on Teacher: Helga hatches a plan to "hire" Stinky, (by bribing him with candy bars), to act as her boyfriend in hopes of making Arnold jealous.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Force of Nature/Viral Vidiots: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Curly Snaps/Preteen Scream: Curly gets enraged after a minor playground mix-up. He locks himself in the principal's office and refuses to come out. Phoebe has a secret crush on a pop star.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Timmy's tired of being the guinea pig when the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies compete to see "who is the best magical creature in the universe?" He suggests a competition to determine once and for all who is best.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Arnold is given the assignment to tutor Torvald, the meanest, toughest kid in Arnold's math class, for the big math test on Friday./Gerald convinces Arnold to allow him to spend the night at Arnold's house.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Monkey Business/Big Caesar: After being scratched by an organ grinder's monkey, Helga is convinced her days are numbered.Arnold and Gerald attempt to catch the biggest fish in the city pond.

programme.desc: Big Bob gets a parrot which eventually gets on his nerves. He passes the bird on to Helga, who spills her emotions about Arnold to the bird. Arnold and Gerald decide to sell chocolate turtles to raise money for the club's ongoing go-cart project.

programme.desc: When Norb gets a train set for Arbor Day and Dag only gets an air freshener, Dag's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.desc: Dub recommends Kenzie see an eccentric pet plastic surgeon in order to fix her cat's loud nose holes. Meanwhile, Trip tries to get Hudson into a Boy Band.

programme.desc: The Palm Woods school is having it's annual Prom and Carlos, James, Logan and Kendall are all determined to win the prom king title, doing whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: In an attempt to seal a promotional partnership with Clam Jumper, the Game Shakers try to hack a billboard and live-stream their new game.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 12
